title: Insurance and Annuities Management: Liability Insurance
description: Conroe ISD maintains liability insurance coverage to protect the district, its employees, and its operations from financial losses that could result from accidents, injuries, or other unexpected events. Having this coverage in place helps ensure that the district's resources remain available for student programs and services rather than being diverted to cover unforeseen costs. Community members can have confidence that the district takes steps to manage financial risks responsibly on behalf of the public it serves.
